title: ZRC-ND-3.5M Guard minimum validation BOM
objective: Define a procurement-ready minimum bill of materials for non-cell validation of the ZRC-ND-3.5M Guard lead without implying that any item is already proven compatible with CL1-like neural wetware.

items.required_spec: Regenerated cellulose dialysis membrane or tubing, nominal 3.5 kDa MWCO, low protein binding, aqueous medium compatible, enough area for coupon replicates.
items.anchor_product: Repligen Spectra/Por 3 Standard Grade RC, 3.5 kD MWCO trial kit or equivalent RC membrane.
items.reject_if: Cellulose ester only, unknown MWCO, unknown preservative, high protein binding, or format cannot support replicated coupon testing.

items.required_spec: Regenerated cellulose dialysis membrane or tubing, nominal 10 kDa MWCO, same general geometry class as the 3.5 kDa membrane when possible.
items.anchor_product: Repligen Spectra/Por 7 pre-treated Standard Grade RC, 10 kD MWCO or equivalent matched RC membrane.
items.reject_if: Cannot be compared by membrane area/exposure to the 3.5 kDa lead.

items.required_spec: Sterile 0.22 um SFCA syringe or inline filter with low protein binding, low extractables/leachables, and low hold-up volume.
items.anchor_product: CELLTREAT 0.22 um sterile SFCA syringe filter or equivalent low-binding SFCA guard.
items.reject_if: High protein binding, surfactant leaching concern, large hold-up volume, or unknown membrane material.

items.required_spec: Sterile 0.22 um PES syringe or inline filter with low protein binding and cell-culture media compatibility.
items.anchor_product: Sterile Millex or equivalent PES 0.22 um low-binding syringe filter.
items.reject_if: Binding/hold-up is not characterized enough for trophic-factor recovery testing.

items.role: observed side-stream coupon cartridge or screening chip
items.required_spec: COC/COP wetted housing or chip with optical access, mini-Luer/Luer-style ports, low dead volume, and no PDMS in the primary wetted path.
items.anchor_product: COC microfluidic chip with Mini Luer ports, such as a ChipShop/Darwin or Sigma COC screening chip.
items.reject_if: PDMS primary wetted path, opaque housing, unknown adhesive exposure, or no way to observe bubbles/precipitate.

items.role: PDA primer precursor for controlled surface-only route
items.required_spec: Dopamine hydrochloride or equivalent PDA precursor suitable for research coating trials, with lot documentation and no direct cell exposure before blank testing.
items.anchor_product: Sigma-Aldrich dopamine hydrochloride or equivalent research-grade dopamine hydrochloride.
items.reject_if: No lot/COA documentation, unknown purity, or incompatible contaminants for media blank testing.

items.required_spec: MPC monomer or preformed polyMPC/PMPC compatible with surface-only coating development; document inhibitor, purity, polymerization or immobilization route.
items.anchor_product: Sigma-Aldrich 2-Methacryloyloxyethyl phosphorylcholine, 97%, or equivalent MPC source.
items.reject_if: Unknown inhibitor/purity, no route to remove soluble residuals, or no way to check extractables after coating.

items.required_spec: Quantitative lactate assay compatible with cell culture supernatant or matched medium, with medium-matched standards/spike recovery.
items.anchor_product: Abcam L-Lactate Assay Kit ab65331 or equivalent enzymatic/colorimetric lactate assay.
items.reject_if: No demonstrated compatibility with culture media or no workable spike/recovery controls.

items.required_spec: Quantitative ammonia/ammonium assay compatible with cell culture media or matched medium standards.
items.anchor_product: Abcam Ammonia Assay Kit ab83360 or equivalent ammonia/ammonium assay.
items.reject_if: Cannot run pH/matrix-matched standards or cannot distinguish matrix interference.

items.required_spec: BDNF ELISA or validated immunoassay compatible with the selected species/proxy and cell culture supernatant matrix.
items.anchor_product: Abcam Human BDNF ELISA Kit ab212166 or species-matched equivalent.
items.reject_if: Wrong species/form specificity or no matrix recovery plan.

items.required_spec: NGF ELISA or validated immunoassay compatible with the selected species/proxy and cell culture supernatant matrix.
items.anchor_product: R&D Systems Human beta-NGF DuoSet ELISA DY256 or species-matched equivalent.
items.reject_if: Wrong species/form specificity or no matrix recovery plan.

items.required_spec: pH, conductivity, osmolality, turbidity/visual inspection, and flow/pressure proxy readouts sufficient to evaluate gate thresholds.
items.anchor_product: Lab pH meter, conductivity meter, osmometer access, plate reader or turbidity/visual log, and simple flow/pressure monitoring.
items.reject_if: Cannot measure pH/osmolality/conductivity drift relative to no-module control.
